series_metadata.series_description: Report detailing the personnel attributes of ODJFS, a "snap shot” of the human resource activity of the agency. Report includes, but is not limited to, statistics on the number of employees; the various classifications, bargaining unit and exempt positions; employee’s average age, education and work experience; pay range; number of applications processed; and the number of promotions, new hires and separations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in office superseded, obsolete or replaced ; Paper: in office superseded, obsolete or replaced
